language_settings.auto_translate.descrip: When on, posts in another language are translated for you automatically. When off, you'll see a "Translate" button on those posts instead.
language_settings.privacy_notice: Translations are powered by Google Translate. Translating a post sends its text to Google's servers; we don't keep a copy.
